---
title: "Talks"
subtitle: "Workshops, lectures, and applied analyses presented to live audiences."
body-classes: "ed-page"
listing:
  contents: "**/*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  date-format: long
  fields: [date, title, description]
format:
  html:
    code-tools: false
    page-layout: article
---
